$connectionId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['online', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('online').val() === true && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').val() <= now + 10000

$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && newData.exists() && (!data.exists() || newData.child('durationMs').val() <= data.child('durationMs').val())
$uid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['nickname', 'durationMs', 'imageIndex', 'completedAt', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 4 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 12 && newData.child('durationMs').isNumber() && newData.child('durationMs').val() >= 1000 && newData.child('durationMs').val() <= 600000 && newData.child('imageIndex').isNumber() && newData.child('imageIndex').val() >= 0 && newData.child('imageIndex').val() < 100 && newData.child('completedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('completedAt').val() <= now + 10000 && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').val() <= now + 10000
